title: BAM window-level label manifest
description: Maps each license-cleared corpus annotation to the 3 s / 1.5 s analysis windows used by modeling/acoustic/features.py, producing true window-level labels for one supported head. Heavy audio referenced by `wav` lives in the box and is gitignored; only this manifest plus the eval ship in-repo. Produced by BAM-DATA after an O0-approved fetch; consumed by train_eval.train_head_from_manifest at BAM-TRAIN.

head.description: Must match a key in modeling/acoustic/heads.py HEADS. single_vs_multiple is eval-unsupported per BSW-R02 and is refused by assert_shippable; include it only for diagnostic measurement, never a shipped claim.

min_overlap_frac.description: Minimum fraction of a window that an annotation must cover for the window to take that label; below this the window is `background`.

split_policy.description: Human-readable policy. Default `leave-station-day-out`: whole (dataset, date) groups are held out for test so train and test never share a station-day. This is the cross-station / cross-day generalization the v0 slice lacked.

license_status.description: OPEN ships freely. NC-AUTHORIZED requires a recorded O0/owner sign-off. STOP-to-O0 must not be trained or shipped until O0 clears it.

box_pointer.description: S3 path the raw audio + raw annotations were mirrored to.

label_qc.description: Optional QC summary recorded by BAM-DATA: class balance, dropped/ambiguous annotations, and any privacy scrubbing applied.

wav.description: Repo-relative or absolute path to the decoded audio in the box (gitignored).

dataset.description: Provider / station key; part of the split group.

date.description: YYYY-MM-DD; part of the split group (cross-day).

call_type.description: CK / W / BP category, never S1-S40
